title: tigridia potosina
intro: Tigridia potosina, also known as the Mexican shell flower or Mexican daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tigridia potosina include its potential to reduce inflammation and treat wounds, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
